mapper.select: SELECT banner_id AS bannerId, banner_title AS bannerTitle, image_url AS imageUrl, jump_type AS jumpType, jump_value AS jumpValue, display_position AS displayPosition, sort_no AS sortNo FROM tb_banner WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND display_position = 1 AND NOW() BETWEEN start_time AND end_time ORDER BY sort_no, banner_id

SELECT section_id AS sectionId, section_name AS sectionName, section_type AS sectionType, section_sort AS sectionSort FROM tb_home_section WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY section_sort, section_id

SELECT g.goods_id AS goodsId, g.cate_id AS categoryId, c.cate_name AS categoryName, g.merchant_id AS merchantId, g.goods_name AS goodsName, g.goods_intro AS goodsIntro, g.goods_pic AS goodsPic, MIN(s.sku_id) AS defaultSkuId, MIN(s.price) AS displayPrice, COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST(s.stock - s.lock_stock, 0)), 0) AS totalStock, g.sell_count AS sellCount, g.comment_count AS commentCount, g.goods_score AS goodsScore FROM tb_home_section_goods hsg JOIN tb_goods g ON g.goods_id = hsg.goods_id LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON c.cate_id = g.cate_id LEFT JOIN tb_goods_sku s ON s.goods_id = g.goods_id AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_deleted = 0 WHERE hsg.section_id = #{sectionId} AND hsg.status = 1 AND g.status = 1 AND g.audit_status = 1 AND g.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY g.goods_id, g.cate_id, c.cate_name, g.merchant_id, g.goods_name, g.goods_intro, g.goods_pic, g.sell_count, g.comment_count, g.goods_score, hsg.sort_no HAVING COUNT(s.sku_id) > 0 ORDER BY hsg.sort_no, g.goods_id DESC

SELECT keyword FROM tb_hot_search_keyword WHERE status = 1 AND stat_date = (SELECT MAX(stat_date) FROM tb_hot_search_keyword WHERE status = 1) ORDER BY hot_score DESC, search_count DESC, hot_id ASC LIMIT 8
